content.en:
Inside the boundary seam.

After Ye Tian entered here, he began to look for the place where the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal was deposited.

However, not long after he came in, he came across the demon seed.

Obviously, there are definitely quite a few demon seeds here.

Click!!!

Ye Tian used the grip of the ruin sun to directly pinch and explode this demon seed and kill it in seconds.

Soon, Ye Tian came to the area where the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal was deposited, and began to look for the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material in this area.

But there must not be too much of the Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal here, but it is not too little, otherwise it will not be able to form mineral deposits.

"The breath here contains a trace of the Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal substance, if the normal realm god comes here, it won't be able to support it for too long, and there will be problems with the Eternal Dao Seed, and if it takes a long time, it will inevitably turn into a demon seed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, the environment here had little effect on him.

Ye Tian searched for the Xuandevouring Demon Crystal ore by sensing the breath of the Xuandevouring Demon Crystal substance, but even so, he might not be able to find it.

Because many of the Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal ores are hidden very deeply, and the land here is not an ordinary earth, it is extremely tough, and if you want to tear 16 here, to find the Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal Mine, it is easy to expose yourself, so as to be noticed by the demon seeds.

But.

Ye Tian searched again and again, and finally found a piece of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Ore.

The pitch-black ore was held in Ye Tian's hand, and it contained a strong aura of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance, but not all of it was Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material, and it was also necessary to extract a part of the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material from this ore.

If it is given to other realm gods, it will be difficult to extract it, and if you are not careful, it will affect yourself, and you will be transformed into a demon seed by the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal substance.

But if Ye Tian wants to extract it, it is naturally not difficult.

"Just such a piece of Xuandevouring Demon Crystal Ore, there is a lot of Xuandevouring Demon Crystal material, if I harvest a large amount of Xuandevouring Demon Crystal Ore, then I don't need to worry about condensing the fifth Eternal Realm Spirit, and I can also raise the Eternal Dao Seed of my wife and children to the limit, so that they can impact the Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level cultivation!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Wow!

After Ye Tian put away this piece of Xuanwu Demon Crystal material, he continued to look for the Xuanwu Demon Crystal ore.

But soon, he encountered a demon seed that was comparable to the mid-level peak of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and after he was killed, he was no different.

However, he still left first, so as not to be surrounded by other demon seeds, so he didn't want to get out.

Usually, it's just that, but he still has the Xuanwu Demon Crystal Ore on his body now, so naturally he can't let the replica body fall here.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to look for the Xuan Devouring Demon Realm ore, and often clashed with the demon seeds, sometimes he would suffer, sometimes he would kill the demon seeds, and there were already many demon seeds that died in his hands.

this day.

Ye Tian came out of the boundary rift, he needed to bring out the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material in his hand, and then enter the boundary crack when the time came.

Otherwise, if you really let the copy body fall, the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material will be lost.

And this time, he obtained a total of six pieces of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal Material, and his luck was okay.

After sending out the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material, Ye Tian entered the boundary rift again and continued to search for the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal ore.

And just like that, the years passed.

Suddenly, on this day, Ye Tian was surrounded by six demon seeds that were comparable to the mid-level peak of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and one of them was holding a powerful weapon.

Surrounded by these six demon seeds, Ye Tian was not an opponent, and gradually fell into disadvantage.

But.

Ye Tian still relied on his strength and desperate fighting method to burn everything, burning all the eternal Dao seeds, and forcibly killed a demon seed, and he escaped with his crippled body.

Of course.

In the eyes of those demon seeds, Ye Tian's origin was exhausted and shattered, and the Eternal Dao Seed was almost completely destroyed, and he couldn't live long at all, so he didn't chase and kill too hard.

......

Ye Tian came out, and directly disbanded the replica body that was about to be scrapped.

At this time.

Ye Tian was very excited, because he had previously killed the demon seed that was comparable to the mid-level peak of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and also took away the items on the other party's body.

Now, he took a closer look, but found a lot of Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal ores and Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal weapons, as well as other materials.

"Sixteen pieces of Xuanhua Demon Crystal ore, three Xuanwuming Demon Crystal weapons and other twenty-three materials, this demon seed has a lot of Xuanwu Demon Crystal material on his body, killing one of him is much faster than slowly collecting Xuanwu Demon Crystal material!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Subsequently.

He sent all these Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal materials back to the Terran Holy Kingdom, and he continued to enter the Boundary Rift to find the Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal ore.

And just like that, another period of time passed.

this day.

Ye Tian once again encountered those demon seeds that were comparable to the mid-level peak of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and these demon seeds were extremely shocked when they saw Ye Tian.

"You're not dead?"

They were surprised.

Because Ye Tiandu had already burned the Eternal Dao Seed at the beginning, the origin was shattered, and his body was extremely broken, under such circumstances, it was impossible to live!

Even if he can survive, without the Eternal Dao Species, he will be an ordinary Eternal Dao Realm cultivation at most.

But now, Ye Tian's cultivation is still a middle-level cultivation in the Eternal Realm God Realm, and there seems to be no problem with the Eternal Dao Seed at all, and he still exudes a powerful aura, which is too strange.

"This guy 770 may have some kind of anti-heaven treasure on his body, which can make him recover from all his injuries. "

"Kill him and take the treasure!"

Rumble!!!!

These demon seeds besieged Ye Tian again.

However, this time Ye Tian was still fighting desperately, and they were missing a demon seed, so their combat effectiveness naturally declined a little, and their previous injuries had not yet recovered, resulting in a lot of decline in their combat power compared to the last time.

This time.

Ye Tian was still fighting for his life, killing a demon seed at the peak of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

And then.

A few of them chased Ye Tian frantically, not wanting Ye Tian to escape.

It's a pity that they fell into the trap.

Just when Ye Tian fled into a place, a replica body suddenly appeared around him, this was all deliberately copied by Ye Tian this time, and the replica body left here was to besiege and kill these demon species.

At this time, there were a total of six replica bodies used by Ye Tian, and there were only four of these demon seeds left.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian's six replica bodies began to fight, burning everything to attack the four-headed demon seed.

And these four-headed demon seeds are already not lightly injured, where can they beat Ye Tian, they were quickly killed by Ye Tian, and Ye Tian's copy body still fell two and severely damaged three, but the result was achieved, this is enough!
